notes: Real pricing scraped from studio websites. Studios marked verified=true have prices confirmed from their websites. Studios marked verified=false could not have prices confirmed (Wix rendering issues, 404s, connection refused, etc.).

yama-yoga-bern.note: Wix site - pricing not accessible via scraping. Tried /preise, /pricing, /tarife - all 404.

yoga-carmen-bern.note: Wix site - pricing not rendered in HTML. Tried /preise, /angebot, /preise-1 - all 404.

yoga-luna-bern.note: Single 30 CHF (discounted 25), Luna 5 = 140 CHF, Luna 10 = 270 CHF (discounted 220). Probe Abo = 50 CHF for 3 classes. Monthly unlimited = 220 CHF. Discounts for students, IV, single parents, KulturLegi.

svarupa-yoga-bern.note: Prices page exists but content loaded dynamically via Punchpass - not accessible via scraping.

yogveda-bern.note: Only schema.org priceRange '30 CHF' found in metadata. Full pricing not accessible. Tried /preise, /angebot - 404.

iyengar-yoga-bern.note: Wix site - pricing not rendered in HTML. Tried /preise, /tarife - 404.

yogaalaya-bern.note: No pricing found on homepage. Tried /en/index.php/fees/ - 404. Contact studio directly.

hot-yoga-christoph-herren.note: Wix site - pricing not rendered in HTML. Tried /preise, /angebot - no content accessible.

hot-yoga-bern.note: Connection refused (ECONNREFUSED). Website may be down or blocking automated requests.

hothaus-bern.note: Single 1h = 38 CHF, 1h+ = 40 CHF. 10-class pack = 350 CHF (valid 3 months). Monthly unlimited = 250 CHF. 3 months = 600 CHF. 1 year = 2000 CHF. Intro: 50 CHF for 10 days unlimited (new students).

yogamarket-bern.note: Cookie consent overlay blocks content. Tried /preise/, /klassen/preise/ - no pricing data accessible.

dayayoga-bern.note: Connection refused (ECONNREFUSED). Website may be down.

hrdayam-bern.note: Non-profit, 'Pay what you can' model. No fixed prices listed on website or Momoyoga schedule page.

inside-outside-bern.note: Wix site - pricing not rendered in HTML. Eversports booking page returned 403. Tried /preise - 404.

openyoga-bern.note: No pricing or Abo links found on website. Books via SportsNow. Tried /de/preise.html, /de/abo-preise.html - 404.

origin8-bern.note: Only online class price found: 20 CHF/class. Studio class pricing not displayed. Tried /preise, /angebot - 404.

grey-rebel-bern.note: Wix site - pricing not rendered in HTML. Tried /preise - 404.

natha-yoga-bern.note: Wix site - pricing not rendered in HTML. Tried /preise, /tarife - 404.

yogabern-iyengar.note: Single class (Einzellektion) = 40 CHF. Trial class (Probelektion) = 30 CHF. Intro 10-class course = 250 CHF. Quarterly (10 weeks, 1x/week) = 350 CHF. Semester (20 weeks, 1x/week) = 665 CHF. Annual (40 weeks, 1x/week) = 1260 CHF. Student quarter (under 29) = 220 CHF.

vayam-yoga-bern.note: Drop-in = 37 CHF. Trial = 20 CHF. 5-class 75min = 145 CHF, 90min = 170 CHF. 10-class 75min = 270 CHF, 90min = 320 CHF. Monthly unlimited = 250 CHF. Access Class = 10-35 CHF sliding scale.

devi-yoga-bern.note: Only workshop pricing found: Yoga Nidra & Atem Workshop = 40 CHF. HypnoBirthing = 195 CHF/4h/couple. Regular class prices not listed on main page.

yogakaleidoskop-bern.note: Domain redirects to innerlightacademy.ch (301). May have rebranded. No pricing found on redirected site.

yoga-and-more-bern.note: Single class = 33 CHF. Free trial class (Schnupperstunde gratis). 6-class coupon = 200 CHF (valid 3 months). Quarterly subscription = 330 CHF. No standard 10-class card. Student discounts available. Yoga coaching 1:1 = 85 CHF/60min.

energie-yoga-bern.note: No pricing found on homepage. Tried /preise, /angebot - 404.

soulspace-koeniz.note: Single 60min = 30 CHF, 75min = 35 CHF. 5-class 60min = 135 CHF, 75min = 145 CHF. 10-class 60min = 250 CHF, 75min = 285 CHF. Trial = 20 CHF. Annual membership = 2160 CHF. Private lesson = 180 CHF/60min.

yoga-room-koeniz-thun.note: Domain blocked by security policy. /preise page exists but content loaded dynamically - not accessible.

yoga-bude-thun.note: Wix site - pricing not rendered in HTML. Eversports returned 403. Tried /preise - 404.

yoga-club-biel.note: Prix page exists but prices are in a PDF flyer/image - not extractable via scraping.
